---
title: "Outputs"
format: html
date: 2026/03/12
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

## Papers

- upcoming


## Posters

### 2026

- [The International Biogeography(TIBS) 12th Biennial Conference, Aarhus,Denmark](https://conferences.au.dk/tibs-aarhus-2026/program)

   * Flantua S.G.A.,**Mottl O.**,Felde V.A., Bhatta K.P., 
Birks H.H., Grytnes J., Seddon A.W., & Birks H.J.B.[The workflow to process global palaeoecological data of fossil pollen for large-scale synthesis](Mottl_poster_embed_fonts_rasterise.pdf)

   *  **Námešná N.** & **Mottl O.** [Functional Vegetation Paleoecology:Mitigate the impact of climate change with data-driven insight from past vegetation](poster_FVP_Aarhus.pdf)
   
   * **Novio B.V.** & **Motll O.** A Comparative Analysis of Methodological Frameworks for Reconstructing Continental Diversity Trends of Vegetation: Case of the Northern Hemisphere during the Holocene [![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.18734603.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18734603)
